title: crosscheck test file
description: Schema for crosscheck (cx) *.cx.yaml end-to-end API test files.

name.description: Human-readable name for this test suite.

description.description: Optional longer description of what this suite covers.

env.description: Fallback variable defaults. Real values should come from .env or shell exports — never commit secrets here.

mock.description: Start a local mock HTTP server. MOCK_URL is injected automatically as an environment variable.

port.description: Port for the mock server to listen on (e.g. 9099).

setup.description: Shell commands run once before all tests.

teardown.description: Shell commands run once after all tests, even on failure.

run.description: Shell command to execute. Environment variables from the crosscheck namespace are available as $VAR.

type.description: "static" injects a fixed header value. "login" fires an HTTP request first to obtain a token.

request.description: HTTP request to perform for login auth. Required when type is "login".

capture.description: Fields to extract from the login response and store as variables.

header.description: HTTP header name to inject into every request (e.g. "Authorization").

format.description: Header value template. Use {{ varName }} to reference captured variables (e.g. "Bearer {{ token }}").

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers. Values support {{ VAR }} interpolation.

body.description: Request body serialized as JSON. Supports nested objects.

headers.description: Expected response headers. Values support {{ VAR }} interpolation.

body.description: Expected body fields. String values can be: exact match, /regex/, {{ capture: varName }}, or {{ VAR }} interpolation.

captureMap.description: Maps variable names to JSONPath expressions (e.g. token: "$.accessToken").

adapter.description: Database or service adapter to use.

query.description: SQL query to run. Use :varName for named parameters (e.g. SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = :userId).

key.description: Redis key to look up. Supports {{ VAR }} interpolation (e.g. user:{{ userId }}).

path.description: Mock server path to match (e.g. /webhook). Used with adapter: mock.

method.description: HTTP method to match on the mock server. Used with adapter: mock.

params.description: Named parameter values for the query. Values support {{ VAR }} interpolation.

expect.description: Expected result. Use an array of objects for SQL row assertions, or a single object for key-value assertions (Redis, mock).

oneOf.description: Expected rows returned by a SQL query. Each object maps column names to expected values.
Expected key-value pairs for Redis or mock server assertions.

waitFor.description: Poll the assertion until it passes or the timeout is reached. Useful for async / queue-driven flows.

timeout.description: Maximum time to wait before failing (e.g. "10s", "500ms").

interval.description: How long to wait between retries (e.g. "500ms", "1s").

name.description: Unique name for this test step. Used in output and --filter matching.

description.description: Optional longer description of what this test verifies.

retry.description: Number of times to retry on failure (Phase 2).

setup.description: Shell commands run before this test.

teardown.description: Shell commands run after this test.

database.description: Database or service assertions to run after the HTTP request.

services.description: Service assertions (Redis, SQS, etc.) to run after the HTTP request.
